data.title: ON Semi Joins Top Chip Picks As Tesla Gains And Allegro Deal Signal Upside
data.description: BofA Securities analyst Vivek Arya highlights three top semiconductor picks for recovery: Analog Devices, NXP Semiconductors, and ON Semiconductor.

data.title: Auto ETFs Tumble After Trump's 25% Import Tariff Move On Vehicles Made Overseas
data.description: Trump's 25% tariff on foreign-made vehicles causes auto stocks and ETFs to crash, amplifying market movements and hurting conventional carmakers.

data.title: Roku's Next Chapter: Analyst Sees Big Gains From Streaming And Ad Expansion
data.description: JP Morgan maintained Buy rating on Roku (ROKU) with price target of $100. Roku is leading streaming platform poised for growth in monetization and revenue.

data.title: TMC Pushes For 'The Fastest Pathway To Commercial Production' Despite Environmental Risks
data.description: Deep-sea mining company TMC seeks approval from Trump admin to mine metals in Pacific sea bed, sparking concerns over international law and environment.

data.title: Peter Schiff Tells Bitcoin 'Hodlers' To 'Get A Clue' As Gold Outpaces Digital Gold
data.description: Economist and long-time gold advocate Peter Schiff on Friday criticized Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) year-to-date decline, highlighting gold's quiet
